entities.name: GRAIN IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of iron (Fe) in the grains of crops, which is a key trait for nutritional improvement

entities.name: FE-DEFICIENCY ANAEMIA
entities.description: A health condition resulting from insufficient iron intake

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) grown in arid and semi-arid tropical regions of Africa and Asia

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where pearl millet is a major source of dietary energy

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where pearl millet is a major source of dietary energy

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal crop compared with pearl millet regarding grain iron content

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop compared with pearl millet regarding grain iron content and used for testing the Prussian blue stain method

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop compared with pearl millet regarding grain iron content

entities.name: ATOMIC ABSORPTION SPECTROPHOTOMETRY
entities.description: A chemical analysis method used for the estimation of iron content in digests

entities.name: INDUCTIVELY COUPLED PLASMA-ATOMIC ABSORPTION SPECTROPHOTOMETRY
entities.description: A chemical analysis method used for the estimation of iron content in digests

entities.name: PERLS’ PRUSSIAN BLUE STAIN
entities.description: A rapid screening method for grain iron content involving color intensity scoring in the embryo

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A systematic process of selecting and breeding genotypes to improve specific traits like grain iron content

relationships.description: Increasing grain iron content reduces the incidence of Fe-deficiency anaemia
